name: Red Snapper Fillets, Florida Style
recipeIngredient: A combination of lemon and lime
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Fannie Farmer
Preheat oven to 400°F. Put the fillets in a lightly buttered baking dish. Sprinkle them lightly with salt, pepper, and nutmeg, and distribute the grated rinds on top. Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes.
